description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat, expansive roof and a clean, geometric layout. The structure features a combination of light gray roofing, white and light-colored walls, and large windows, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The front includes a covered entryway with a carport and a driveway, while landscaped areas with shrubs and trees surround the building. The rear of the house opens to a private patio and garden space, with additional greenery and outdoor seating. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes and others smaller, contributing to the modern design. The house is set on a rectangular plot with a mix of hardscape and softscape elements, including a visible car parked in the driveway.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a carport and private patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, driveway, main entryway, and landscaped front yard with shrubs and a parked car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roof, asymmetrical window placement, and a glimpse of the rear patio and garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private patio, garden area, and more greenery, with less emphasis on the entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport from a different angle, additional landscaping, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, carport, and minimalistic door, flanked by landscaped elements.
